title: aurinia sinuata
intro: Aurinia sinuata, also known as the mouse ear or purple mouse ear, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema, acne, and dermatitis, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Aurinia sinuata include its ability to soothe irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Aurinia sinuata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used topically to address skin issues and internally to support overall well-being.
